primary.name: EIS
primary.why_selected: Official publication point for Russian procurement under 44-FZ and 223-FZ; provides notices, lots, protocols, contracts, and document links.
primary.collection_method: Search by customer INN, date period, and law type; store raw HTML/XML when available.

enrichment.name: Sberbank-AST
enrichment.why_selected: Likely key ETP for Sber-related and 223-FZ procedures; can enrich EIS records with platform-specific details.

enrichment.name: Roseltorg
enrichment.why_selected: Large federal electronic platform with 44-FZ, 223-FZ, commercial, and corporate procurement sections.

enrichment.name: RTS-Tender
enrichment.why_selected: Federal ETP; useful for cross-source matching and duplicate detection.

enrichment.name: ETP GPB
enrichment.why_selected: Major ETP for 223-FZ and corporate procurement.

enrichment.name: ZakazRF
enrichment.why_selected: Federal and regional procurement platform; checked for records linked from EIS.

enrichment.name: Lot-Online
enrichment.why_selected: Electronic platform for auctions and asset-related procedures; checked when EIS/platform links point there.

enrichment.name: TEK-Torg
enrichment.why_selected: Major ETP, but may require manual or guarded access because anti-bot protection can block automated collection.
